title: Business Development Manager
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

SFIC Institute Pte Ltd, a subsidiary of the Singapore Furniture Industries Council (SFIC), we strive to be the one-stop solutions provider for our industry players and beyond. We partner closely with industry and international experts to ensure that our programmes are abreast with the latest trends and developments. To cater to the needs of the industry, we offer a holistic range of courses and services which include areas such as human resources & business consultancy (under Momentum Strategies Brand), training and development and design-centric workshops. We partner with various governmental agencies such as NTUC’s e2i, Enterprise Singapore, Workforce Singapore (WSG), SkillsFuture Singapore (SSG) etc;

Job Summary

We are seeking a dynamic and results-driven Business Development Manager to identify and secure new business opportunities, manage client relationships, and promote consultancy (under Momentum Strategies Brand) and training services. You will advise clients on government grants and guide potential students through enrollment, driving measurable business growth and client satisfaction.

Responsibilities

  • Identify, source, and secure new business opportunities for consultancy services in technology, sustainability, internationalisation, and job redesign to expand market reach
  • Build and nurture strong client relationships by understanding their business needs and delivering tailored advisory solutions that drive client success
  • Advise clients on relevant government grants and guide them through the application process to maximize funding opportunities
  • Prepare and deliver compelling business proposals, reports, and sales presentations to influence client decision-making and close deals
  • Coordinate projects with internal and external stakeholders to ensure timely and effective service delivery
  • Develop and implement strategic business development plans to achieve revenue growth targets and enhance market presence
  • Promote training courses and consult potential students, providing clear guidance through the enrollment process to increase program participation
  • Collaborate with internal teams to ensure seamless client service and maintain high levels of client satisfaction
  • Monitor industry trends, government initiatives, and emerging business opportunities to inform strategy and maintain competitive advantage

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field
  • Proven experience in business development, consultancy, or sales, preferably within professional services
  • Strong knowledge of business trends, government grants, and industry best practices
  • Excellent communication, negotiation, and relationship-building skills demonstrated through successful client engagements
  • Ability to work autonomously and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment
  • Prior experience in training or education sales is advantageous

postedCompany.description:
SFIC Institute Pte Ltd, a subsidiary of the Singapore Furniture Industries Council (SFIC) started off as a training and development initiative for the furniture industry in 2004. It was privatised in October 2010 to cope with the growing needs for human resources and talent development. This is to ensure the furniture industry’s long-term viability and sustainability goals are met.

At SFIC Institute, we strive to be the one-stop solutions provider for our industry players. We partner closely with industry and international experts to ensure that our programmes are abreast with the latest trends and developments. Our programmes are experiential, practical and relevant. Trainees will definitely enjoy and learn through our experiential activities.

To cater to the needs of the industry, we offer a holistic range of courses and services which include areas such as human resources consultancy; recruitment services; training and development and design-centric workshops. We partner with various governmental agencies such as NTUC’s e2i,  Enterprise Singapore, Workforce Singapore (WSG), SkillsFuture Singapore (SSG) etc; tapping on their funding support to ensure that SFIC Institute offers the best values programmes and initiatives to our customers.
postedCompany.name: SFIC INSTITUTE PTE. LTD.
